desc._value: A hard piece of rock that forms the body of a Jr. Sentinel.
A shell removed from a snail.
A shell removed from a snail.
The spore of a mushroom.
A shell removed from a snail.
A branch bent away from a tree.
Very thick and sticky liquid.
A bubble removed from a Slime.
A head of a pig.
A cap removed from a mushroom.
Taken from a pig with a ribbon.
A leaf that's taken out of a tree.
A leg removed from an octopus.
A cap removed from a mushroom.
A huge bubble removed from a Bubbling.
A high quality piece of firewood from an Axe Stump.
A cap removed from a mushroom.
A wing cut off of a Stirge.
A piece of skin from a Jr. Necki.
A cap removed from a mushroom.
A charm taken from an undead monster.
A canine tooth taken from a Wild Boar.
A tail removed from a lizard.
A metal hoof that covered the legs of an Iron Hog.
A tentacle removed from a Fairy. Very small and delicate, so it should be handled with care.
A very solid and tough piece of skin from a Ligator.
A canine tooth taken from a Fire Boar.
A tail removed from a lizard.
A tablecloth donned by a Jr. Wraith.
A horn removed from a Jr. Boogie. Small, dense, and hard to break.
A miniature figure of a Lupin.
It's a Lupin's favorite: a tasty banana.
A huge piece of claw cut off of a Lorang.
A cursed doll possessed by a Zombie Lupin.
A tail removed from a lizard.
A seed cut out of a Nependeath. It's poisonous, so it shouldn't be taken lightly.
It's the skull of a Drake.
A shell cut off of a Tortie's back.
A seed cut out of a Dark Nependeath. It's poisonous and covered with thorns, so it should be handled with care.
A medicine with weird vibes left by a Wraith.
A huge piece of claw cut off of a Clang.
A very solid and tough piece of skin from a Croco.
A bottle containing frogs that a Malady had for various experiments.
Mystic rubble that was a part of a Stone Golem.
Mystic rubble that was a part of a Dark Stone Golem.
An eye removed from a Wild Kargo.
A very solid and heavy piece of horn from a Tauromacis.
A very tough and heavy piece of horn from a Taurospear.
A spore from Mushmom, a humongous mushroom.
An animal's skin that's been cut away.
A solid piece of dragon's skin that gives off a mysterious light.
The spore of a glowing mushroom.
A small petal taken from the bud of a parasitic flower.
A wing cut off of a Golden Stirge, a small bat glowing with golden light.
A tail removed from an Aqumander.
A leg removed from a glowing octopus.
A large petal taken from a fully bloomed parasitic flower.
A tail removed from a Duskmander.
A bough broken off of a huge tree.
An old and putrid charm taken from a rotting undead monster.
A bough broken off of a huge, decaying tree.
A fresh coconut made in Florina Beach.
A small bundle of animal fur. Soft and light, it looks like it could drift away at any moment.
The source of magical power once possessed by a monster. A mysterious energy can be felt.
A poisonous mushroom that lives on the humongous Zombie Mushroom.
A cap removed from a Rotten Mushmom.
A shiny glass shoes for women only.
A coupon earned by taking down a monster. Can be traded for a pass.
A pass earned by trading with a coupon. Can only advance to the next stage with a pass.
A fancily decorated mirror.
A book with a dangerous content.
An old gold watch. An article left by Alex's late mother.
A lost deed to the land for "Blackbull" of Perion.
A scroll from long ago that contains powerful, mysterious magic from then.
A flame with the look of a feather. It never stops burning.
A souvenir for entering the event. Made out of gold, so you can sell it for a high price.
A small screw made out of steel. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Processed wood made out of tree branches. Used as a material for crafting various items.
A feather that's stiff and rough. Used as a material for crafting various items.
A soft and light feather. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Water frozen through the power of magic. Doesn't melt easily.
A piece of wing from a fairy. It's soft and brittle, so it should be handled with care.
Finely processed leather. Used as a material for crafting various items.
A thin but durable spool of thread. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Softly processed cloth. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Finely crafted parchment. It is used as a material when creating magic-infused scrolls.
A black dye used to dye items black when crafting certain items.
A white dye used to dye items white when crafting certain items.
A red dye used to dye items red when crafting certain items.
A yellow dye used to dye items yellow when crafting certain items.
A blue dye used to dye items blue when crafting certain items.
The ore of a light and weak bronze.
The ore of a tough iron.
The ore of a light, solid mithril.
The ore of a heavy, strong adamantium.
The ore of a shiny silver.
The ore of orihalcon, a very rare mineral.
The ore of gold, a very rare mineral.
A light, weak, refined bronze.
A tough, refined iron.
A solid, light, refined mithril.
A heavy, strong, refined adamantium.
A shiny, refined silver.
A very rare, refined orihalcon.
A very rare, refined gold.
A glittering mineral that possesses the mysterious power of the moon.
The ore of a red jewel.
The ore of a purple jewel.
The ore of a blue jewel.
The ore of a green jewel.
The ore of a jewel with many colors.
The ore of a blue, transparent jewel.
The ore of a yellow jewel.
The ore of a transparent jewel.
An ore of a crystal that has dark powers stored in it.
A red jewel.
A purple jewel.
A blue jewel.
A green jewel.
A jewel with many colors.
A blue, transparent jewel.
A yellow jewel.
A transparent jewel.
A very rare crystal that has dark powers stored in it.
A glittering jewel that possesses the mysterious power of a star.
Sera's mirror. Has lots of decorations on it.
A letter written by Maria. Needs to be delivered to Lucas of Amherst.
A letter written by Lucas. Needs to be delivered to Mushroom Town's Maria.
A rusty screw from an old, unusable box that has been broken down. Can this be recycled?
An old wooden board from an old, unusable box that has been broken down. Can this be recycled?
A special sauce from Estelle of Ellinia. Its ingredients and formulas are all kept secret.
An old gold watch. An article left by Alex's late mother.
A piece of a shattered mirror.
A huge glass marble that is transparent and radiates in multiple colors. At the corner of it says "To My Friend Utah."
No telling the power of this mysterious, weird medicine.
A bottle full of Arcon's blood.
A sparking rock that shines by itself.
Leaves of the Witchgrass growing in the swamps. Laden with incredible magical powers, it is used as a primary source for herbal medicine.
A letter from Dances with Balrog of Perion. Needs to be shown to the Warrior Job Instructor somewhere around the highland.
A letter from Grendel the Really Old of Ellinia. Needs to be shown to the Magician Job Instructor somewhere around the forest.
A letter from Athena Pierce of Henesys. Needs to be shown to the Bowman Job Instructor somewhere around the entrance to the Dungeon.
A letter from Dark Lord of Kerning City. Needs to be shown to the Thief Job Instructor somewhere around the city.
A mysterious marble that possesses the dark, ugly nature of the monster.
A proof from the instructor that you have passed the test for the 2nd job advancement. Once possessed, you'll be recognized as a hero.
A mysterious marble that possesses the dark, ugly nature of the monster.
A proof from the instructor that you have passed the test for the 2nd job advancement. Once possessed, you'll be recognized as a hero.

A proof from the instructor that you have passed the test for the 2nd job advancement. Once possessed, you'll be recognized as a hero.
A pile of flowers that give off pink, mystical colors.
A double-rooted Red Ginseng.
A fully reawaken Gladius that a hero has used.
A fragment of the map that Zelya lost.
A bough broken off a huge, decaying tree. It gives off a foreboding aura.
A special Unagi consisting of the tails of Curse Eye...and pig's head. Needs to be delivered to Ronnie.
A fresh milk from the fairies. Needs to be delivered to Ronnie.
No one knows what's in this book.
A feather burning in black. So light, it feels like it's going to fly away.
A scroll with unrecognizable ancient characters on it.
A letter from Bartos the instructor. Needs to be delivered to Frod.
The ticket that allows you to enter Construction Site B1 of Kerning City Subway.
The ticket that allows you to enter Construction Site B2 of Kerning City Subway.
The ticket that allows you to enter Construction Site B3 of Kerning City Subway.
The coin that Shumi lost.
The roll of cash that Shumi lost.
The sack of money that Shumi lost.
A pink flower with a huge flower bud.
A blue flower with a huge flower bud.
A white flower with a huge flower bud.
The monster cards needed for the game of Match Cards. Need to have plenty of cards.
A wooden table that allows you to play Omok.
A slime-shaped Omok piece to play Omok.

A red cape for women-only. Looks like it's going to be very warm.
A mystical scroll written in a lost ancient language.
A map that shows where the jewels are hidden away.
A box locked away with a powerful magical lock. Apparently there are jewels inside.
A fossil of an animal from thousands of years ago.
A fossil of a leaf of a plant from thousands and thousands of years ago.
A letter of recommendation from Winston the Archeologist. Need to deliver this to Dr. Betty of Ellinia.
A wooden box that contains fossils. The cover on the box reads 'WARNING: Handle with CARE.'
A plant that's been dug out and kept with everything in tact,
Drake Skull kept in its original state through chemicals.
Dr. Betty's final report on the studies of fossils.
Very rarely found on Dark Axe Stump's. A hardened liquid from Stump.
A toy sword that Ayan played with growing up.
A letter from Ayan. Must be delievered to Bruce of Henesys.
A pouch made out of alligator skin. Looks sturdy enough to hold on to most anything.
A fairy medicine made with a collection of rare, hard-to-find ingredients. There's a legend that anyone that takes pill can fly, but it's only been passed around from generations to generations.
A mushroom spore given by Arwen the Fairy. Must take it to Grendel the Really Old for analysis.
A mushroom gathered near the strange cave entrance.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses slime and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and slime-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses slime and octopus-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses octopus and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and octopus-shaped figures for the game.
A set that allows you to play Match Cards.

A scroll required for transferring a pet’s level. Bring this scroll to Mar the Fairy in Mar’s Forest in Ellinia, and you can transfer a pet’s level and closeness to another pet.\n#cDouble-click on the item for more information.#
When used while crafting equipment, there is a chance to randomize the item's bonus stats.
When used while crafting scrolls, there is a chance to produce an Intermediate, Greater, or Chaos scroll of the same category.
